summary: 34-analyst consensus Buy rating as of Apr 30, 2026. Average PT ~$290-297. High target $375 (DA Davidson, Susquehanna), low $120. Mix: 41% Strong Buy, 38% Buy, 21% Hold, 0% Sell. Stock at ~$353, trading above consensus average PT.
